# MuleSoft EDIFACT EDI Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (2.10) of EDIFACT EDI Connector documentation.
> See [EDIFACT EDI Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/edifact-edi-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the EDIFACT EDI Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [EDIFACT EDI Connector 2.10 Batch Outbound EDIFACT Messages](https://docs.mulesoft.com/edifact-edi-connector/latest/edifact-edi-connector-batching.md)
- [EDIFACT EDI Connector 2.10 Configuring Schemas](https://docs.mulesoft.com/edifact-edi-connector/latest/edifact-edi-connector-config-topics.md)
- [EDIFACT EDI Connector 2.10 Control Numbers](https://docs.mulesoft.com/edifact-edi-connector/latest/edifact-edi-connector-control-numbers.md)
- [EDIFACT EDI Connector 2.10 Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/edifact-edi-connector/latest/edifact-edi-connector-examples.md)
- [EDIFACT EDI Connector 2.10 Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/edifact-edi-connector/latest/edifact-edi-connector-reference.md)
- [Using Anypoint Studio to Configure EDIFACT EDI Connector 2.10](https://docs.mulesoft.com/edifact-edi-connector/latest/edifact-edi-connector-studio.md)
- [EDIFACT EDI Connector 2.10 XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/edifact-edi-connector/latest/edifact-edi-connector-xml-maven.md)
- [EDIFACT EDI Connector 2.10 Supported Versions](https://docs.mulesoft.com/edifact-edi-connector/latest/edifact-edi-versions.md)
- [EDIFACT EDI Connector 2.10](https://docs.mulesoft.com/edifact-edi-connector/latest/index.md)
